title: Development harness (instruction/state/feature/feedback/bootstrap)
user_visible_behavior: AGENTS.md rules, PROGRESS.md continuity, feature list, init.sh, and a deterministic E2E suite.
verification: bun run verify green; ./init.sh clean; E2E-1 + E2E-2 pass with no network/API.
evidence: bun run verify green (19 pass, 0 fail); env -u ANTHROPIC_API_KEY bun test test/e2e passes (2 pass, no key); ./init.sh clean.
notes: This plan. Set to passing only when E2E-1/E2E-2 pass and verify is green.

title: External evidence wiring (STR scan results + property facts)
user_visible_behavior: bun run run-address --evidence-file <json> feeds STR scan results and property facts to the packets that can reason with them; with no --evidence-file the engine runs blind exactly as before.
verification: bun run verify; test/external_evidence_exposure.test.ts (the critical negative test); test/prose_external_evidence.test.ts (scrubber survival); test/e2e E2E-3 (parity guard) + E2E-4 (enriched); env -u ANTHROPIC_API_KEY bun test test/e2e; OE_PROSE_REDACT=1 bun run verify. LIVE RUN (real LLM + real graph service on :8000 against the prebuilt graph.sqlite): bun run cli/run_address.ts --address '1104 SPRING RUN RD' --zip 40514 --evidence-file <payload>, plus a blind control with no --evidence-file.
evidence: OE_PROSE_REDACT=off OE_PROSE_REGISTER=off bun run verify: typecheck clean, lint 0 errors (3 pre-existing warnings), 132 pass / 0 fail / 556 expect() across 23 files (baseline before this work: 56 pass / 0 fail). bun run e2e: 4 pass / 0 fail (E2E-1..E2E-4). env -u ANTHROPIC_API_KEY -u OPENAI_API_KEY bun test test/e2e with .env moved aside then restored byte-identical: 4 pass / 0 fail (no key, no network). UNDER THE EXPERIMENT FLAGS after the glossary scope fix (b0e3ef8): OE_PROSE_REGISTER=on -> 131 pass / 1 fail; both flags on (the local .env default) -> 130 pass / 2 fail. Those 1-2 residual failures are TAUTOLOGICAL - 'proseRedactEnabled > is off by default' and '_prose_register_lines > is empty by default (flag off)' assert the flags are off, so enabling a flag breaks them by construction. Both predate this work. ZERO real failures in every config. BOTH ACCEPTANCE GUARDS OBSERVED FAILING BEFORE BEING TRUSTED: adding str_scan to owner_identity_and_mailing broke the critical negative test on all 3 fronts (solo/compact, solo/full, production bucket union) plus packets_exposure_map; making rental_market_summary_lines(null) return ['probe'] broke E2E-3. Both reverted, green after. || LIVE FUNCTIONAL VERIFICATION 2026-07-17 (not projected - actually run, real LLM, real graph). ENRICHED: exit 0, 1m46s, 133,203-byte report, 48 llm calls / 45 graphql. verdict review, raw 23, calibrated 18, archetype ambiguous_nonowner_occupancy. Payload landed: context property_types ['single_family'] while evidence_map.property_types [] (Correction 2 PROVEN live - the scoring gate stayed blind); rental_market_summary 3 lines incl. the address-match framing; evidence_refs ordered str_scan, property_facts, tax (external first, survived slice(0,8)). ZERO EXPOSURE LEAKS across all 6 packets that ran. case_quality_and_synthesis cited BOTH str_scan and property_facts - the packet argued hardest for, and the only one that used them. BLIND CONTROL: exit 0, 1m40s. verdict review, raw 16, calibrated 14, archetype owner_present_with_rental_indicators. property_types [], rental_market_summary [], NO external source in any evidence_ref or the evidence_pack. BLIND vs ENRICHED (same code, same address, same model, payload the only difference): raw 16 -> 23, calibrated 14 -> 18, archetype owner_present_with_rental_indicators -> ambiguous_nonowner_occupancy, band review both. NOTE the blind run independently reached 'rental indicators' from public records alone - the original experiment's question, answered affirmatively at n=1. KNOWN-CONSEQUENCE CONFIRMED LIVE: the blind report contains the str_scan/property_facts TOKENS in exactly 11 places, all in investigation_plan.expected_sources / known_data_gaps (the fallback planner reading static input_sources). Vocabulary, never evidence - the blind evidence_map and evidence_pack are clean. It cannot reach the browser: X-011's InvestigationReportDTO carries only adjudication/caveats/heuristics/score_breakdown and drops investigation_plan.
notes: Contract in src/agents/external_evidence.ts; exposure map locked by test/packets_exposure_map.test.ts. str_scan/property_facts deliberately NOT in SUBSTANTIVE_SOURCES. evidence_map.property_types stays EMPTY on purpose - it feeds _has_portfolio_hint, a SCORING gate; the type reaches prompts via ResolvedAddressContext only. TWO REAL DEFECTS THIS WORK FOUND AND FIXED, both of which would have shipped green while silently gutting the feature: (1) the prose scrubber ate 'for_rent' via SNAKE_RE - fixed through commit 6a885ba's existing CONTROLLED_VOCABULARY set, no second mechanism; vrbo/realtor survived naturally as bare lowercase words. (2) buildProseRegisterLines rendered the glossary UNSCOPED into every prompt, broadcasting the str_scan/property_facts tokens to owner_identity_and_mailing whenever OE_PROSE_REGISTER is on - which the local .env makes the default dev environment. Same bug class as the full-profile hole: a channel ignoring scope. Fixed in b0e3ef8 by gating ONLY the external sources on the packet's own scope (or the bucket's union), leaving graph-source entries unconditional so the in-flight register A/B is not perturbed. Only vocabulary ever leaked, never evidence content - the selective-exposure design held. KNOWN CONSEQUENCES (decisions of record, not bugs): input_sources is static so exposed packets name str_scan in 'Context scope' lines even blind (no evidence content leaks; E2E-3 asserts it); the BUCKET is the unit of exposure via _union_source_scope, so owner_identity sees property_facts and legal_address_presence sees str_scan through bucket-mates - the collapse-critical exclusions survive and are asserted at both levels. NOT DONE HERE: the live full-stack run + blind control (needs the backend passing --evidence-file, a graph service and an LLM). Until then this branch's path is dormant - external_evidence defaults null - which is why the parity guard makes it safe to merge first.

title: Engine as an independent HTTP service (POST /investigate, streaming NDJSON)
user_visible_behavior: bun run serve starts a long-running service; POST /investigate streams progress frames then a terminal {report}/{error} frame. 400 on a body failing AgentInvestigationRequestSchema (strict), 401 on a missing/bad bearer, 503 + Retry-After when saturated. should_cancel stops launching new subagent work on client disconnect or the overall timeout. The CLI and the pipeline are unchanged.
verification: OE_PROSE_REDACT=off OE_PROSE_REGISTER=off bun run verify; OE_PROSE_REDACT=off OE_PROSE_REGISTER=off bun run e2e; test/http_service.test.ts (stream verbatim, 400/401/503, timeout->cancel, healthz, shutdown); test/cancellation.test.ts (sites 1-4); test/e2e/http_service.e2e.test.ts (blind byte-identity + full-pipeline clean stream); test/fake_engine_server.test.ts.
evidence: OE_PROSE_REDACT=off OE_PROSE_REGISTER=off bun run verify: typecheck clean, lint 0 errors (3 pre-existing warnings), 152 pass / 0 fail / 619 expect() across 28 files (baseline before this work: 132 pass / 0 fail). The 20 new tests: investigation_wire (4), cancellation (3), http_service (8: stream verbatim + terminal-error frame, 401, 400+zod-path, 503+Retry-After, overall-timeout->cancel, healthz, graceful-shutdown-refusal), fake_engine_server (3), e2e/http_service.e2e (2). OE_PROSE_REDACT=off OE_PROSE_REGISTER=off bun run e2e: 6 pass / 0 fail / 71 expect() across 2 files (original E2E-1..E2E-4 + 2 new service E2E). Under the gitignored .env (both prose flags on), bun test = 150 pass / 2 fail; the 2 are the PRE-EXISTING tautological 'proseRedactEnabled > is off by default' and '_prose_register_lines (gated) > is empty by default' (they assert the flags are off, so the .env breaks them by construction) — not from this work. Live smoke: ENGINE_AUTH_TOKEN=t GRAPHQL_URL=... bun run serve prints 'engine service listening on :8787'; GET /healthz -> 200 (Anthropic key present, clients construct); POST /investigate with no bearer -> 401. DOCKER LIVE FULL-STACK GATE DEFERRED TO THE COORDINATOR (per handoff): docker compose up --build + the live streaming curl + per-investigation latency vs the ~1m50s spawn baseline were NOT run here.
notes: Transport wrapper over investigate_address; Bun.serve is native (no new dependency). Stateless. Shared wire in src/agents/investigation_wire.ts; hooks extended with should_cancel in src/agents/orchestrator.ts (sites 3-4) + src/agents/subagents.ts (sites 1-2); server in src/server/investigate_server.ts; entry cli/serve.ts. Port 8787; healthcheck GET /healthz (auth-exempt); drain window 300s. PLAN CORRECTION: Bun 1.3.10 defers a streaming Response's headers until the first chunk is enqueued, so the plan's Task 4 backpressure test (which held the permit by blocking investigate() BEFORE emitting any frame) deadlocked at `await fetch(a)`; fixed faithfully by having request A emit one progress frame before blocking (server unchanged). Two of the plan's exact code snippets also needed trivial type fixes under this repo's tsconfig/@types/bun: server.port is number|undefined (coalesced to the bound port) and Response.json() returns unknown (cast to any in the two tests that read a property).
